_comment: Copy to ariadne.config.json and edit the paths. Paths are resolved relative to this file. Scanners are inferred from each repo's files at scan time (pom.xml/build.gradle → JVM backend; FastAPI dependency → Python HTTP; package.json + apollo/SDL → TS BFF; package.json → frontend; @cubejs-backend dep → cube). Run `ariadne-mcp config validate` to see what gets inferred. See docs/CONFIG.md for explicit overrides.
